blurb: ReScript is a strongly typed functional language which compiles to both Javascript and native.

key_features.title: OCaml's type system
key_features.content: ReScript brings OCaml's battle-tested powerful type system to Javascript.

key_features.title: Inferred types
key_features.content: No need to specify types, types are inferred by ReScript compiler and are guaranteed to be correct.

key_features.title: Functional Programming
key_features.content: Like OCaml, ReScript is a functional programming language with pattern matching, variants and more.

key_features.title: Easy javascript interop
key_features.content: Javascript interop is easy allowing advatange of existing javascript packages and ecosystem.

key_features.title: Fast compiler
key_features.content: ReScript compilation times are super fast which means fast iteration cycles.

key_features.title: Refactor with ease
key_features.content: Compiler guides you through all places that need to be fixed during refactor until it just works.
